text: I work as a gynecologist in São Paulo.
I have been working in reproductive medicine for eight years.
I have built a strong track record with fertility patients.
Hi, I do not think we have met. I am Mark, from Chicago. And you are?
Hi Mark, I am Eliane. I am a doctor from São Paulo, in Brazil.
Nice to meet you, Eliane. So, what do you do back in Brazil?
I work as a gynecologist, and I specialize in reproductive medicine.
That sounds fascinating. How long have you been doing that?
I have been working in fertility care for about eight years now.
Impressive. And are you working on anything new at the moment?
Yes, actually. I am opening my own clinic next year, with American technology.
That is a big step. I would love to hear more about it over dinner.
My background is in gynecology, and I completed my residency in 2015.
Right now, I am opening my own fertility clinic.

Good evening, everyone, and welcome to the opening session of our executive education program. My name is Mark, and I will be your program coordinator this week. Over the next few days, you will meet leaders from more than twenty countries, from medicine, technology, and finance. Tonight is simple: we just want you to relax and connect. In a few minutes, I will ask each of you to introduce yourself in one minute. Please tell us your name, where you are from, what you do, and one project you are working on right now. Do not worry about perfect grammar. We care about your story, not your accent. So take a breath, and let us begin.

Hi Eliane, it's Dr. Sofia Reyes calling from New York. It has been a long time since your months here at the medical center, and I was thinking about you today. I heard that you have been building something new in reproductive medicine back in Brazil, and I would love to hear more. We are organizing a small case discussion next month, and I immediately thought of your work with fertility patients. I know your English is a little rusty, but honestly, mine was too when I started, and it comes back faster than you think. Give me a call when you have a moment. It would be wonderful to reconnect. Take care, and talk soon.
I have been working in fertility care for eight years.
I have worked in reproductive medicine since 2016.
I have built a strong track record with my patients.
